nodes.name: Otus
nodes.summary: Otus（Otus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联54种鸟类，如White-fronted scops owl、Andaman scops owl、Reddish scops owl等54种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 摩鹿加群岛
nodes.summary: 摩鹿加群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联42种鸟类，包括白腹麻鸭、Goliath coucal、Moluccan brush cuckoo等42种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门

nodes.name: Moluccan scops owl
nodes.summary: The Moluccan scops owl (Otus magicus) is an owl found in the Maluku and Lesser Sunda Islands of Indonesia. It closely resembles the Rinjani scops owl. The following subspecies are recognised: O. m. kalidupae (Hartert, EJO, 1903) - Kaledupa O. m. morotensis (Sharpe, 1875) - Morotai O. m. leucospilus (Gray, GR, 1861) - Halmahera, Ternate, Kasiruta, and Bacan O. m. obira Jany, 1955 - Obi O. m. bouruensis (Sharpe, 1875) - Buru O. m. magicus (Müller, S, 1841) - Seram and Ambon O. m. albiventris (Sharpe, 1875) - west-central Lesser Sundas The Wetar scops owl (O. tempestatis) was previously considered a subspecies, but has since been split. It has spiritual significance to the Pesaguan Dayak people. It is believed to be a sign of misfortune, as its sound is said to be reminiscent of death. This belief may protect the species from being hunted. References BirdLife Species Factsheet - Moluccan Scops-owl Owl pages
